pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly refer to this path.
export_result.sh explicitly checks for this target path.

setup_task.sh explicitly creates these three files.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is entirely synthetic and driven by bash scripts. The template volume is created at /home/ga/Volumes/onboarding_template.hc with password TemplatePass123, containing three generated files (Project_Chimera_Protocol.pdf, Emergency_Contact_List.csv, and Q3_Financial_Forecast.xlsx). The target volume is verified to be created at /home/ga/Volumes/Issued/jdoe_chimera.hc, using the password SerpentSecure2024! and the Serpent encryption algorithm. All metadata claims exactly match the hardcoded values and logic in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
